top_signals.title: Benign CPI inflation takes Fed’s July rate rise off the table
top_signals.summary: Headline and core inflation were below expectations in June and unlikely to persuade rate-setters to tighten policy
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: IBM stock craters 23% after issuing second-quarter earnings warning
top_signals.summary: CEO blamed the shortfall on weakness in the software and infrastructure business because clients shifted money toward hardware purchases.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: IBM shares plunge 23% as customers shift spending to AI
top_signals.summary: Chief executive Arvind Krishna says company ‘faltered’ as clients raced to buy servers and storage
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Strategy became a symbol of the dot-com crash: Could history repeat?
top_signals.summary: MicroStrategy blew up during the dot-com era, before Michael Saylor transformed it into the world's largest corporate Bitcoin holder. Did he learn his lesson?
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
